articles.title: Kouri Richins, author of a children’s book on grief, gets life sentence for killing her husband
articles.description:
Richins was convicted in March of aggravated murder for lacing her husband Eric Richins’ cocktail with five times the lethal dose of fentanyl at their home near Park City in 2022

The post Kouri Richins, author of a children’s book on grief, gets life sentence for killing her husband appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Kouri Richins sentenced to life for murdering husband Eric Richins with fentanyl in 2022.
Richins convicted in March for administering five times the lethal dose of fentanyl.
The case raises awareness about drug-related crimes and safety in Boston communities.

articles.title: AG says auditor can hire attorney to force audit of Legislature after SJC order
articles.description:
“This will move forward,” Attorney General Andrea Campbell said on Boston Public Radio Wednesday.

The post AG says auditor can hire attorney to force audit of Legislature after SJC order appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Attorney General Andrea Campbell confirmed an auditor can hire an attorney for a legislative audit.
This decision follows a Supreme Judicial Court order regarding legislative oversight.
Boston residents may see increased transparency and accountability in state government operations.
